problem id: bda90b57
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11101010 -> 01011110
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01001000 -> 01000100
  10101011 -> 01010010
  01100000 -> 00000110
  00100101 -> 00101010
  10011001 -> 11000001
  01101101 -> 01101110
  11011100 -> 11101101

query: 01001001
predicted answer: 01001100
